other_observers: Larry Semo; Found and identified earlier that day by Scott Rashid.
specific_location: At Sylvan Dale Guest Ranch, north of US 34 along/near the Big Thompson River
description: An obvious "Centurus" woodpecker, with black-and-white barred upperparts, reddish-orange nasal tufts, gray forehead and forecrown, red rearcrown and nape, grayish-white underparts (I could not see the center of the belly), with a black tail with the central rectrices being barred black and white.Behaviors: foraging on deciduous treesCall: none heardPlumage: unknown
